title: Hornet Removal in Baychester, Bronx | $350–$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in Baychester, Bronx. Safe, fast nest elimination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350–$550 service!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Baychester residents, especially around the area's single-family homes and garden apartments near Co-op City and Pelham Parkway. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services throughout Baychester, protecting your family and property from aggressive stinging insects. Our licensed technicians specialize in complete nest elimination with same-day and emergency service available.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Baychester for years with certified technicians who understand the unique pest challenges of the Northeast Bronx. We use safe, effective removal methods with a satisfaction guarantee, and our pricing is transparent with no hidden fees.
localContext: Baychester's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Edenwald Houses and the Hutchinson River Parkway corridor create ideal nesting conditions for hornets in eaves, sheds, and under porches. The mix of co-op buildings, detached homes, and commercial properties along Boston Road requires experienced professionals who can handle hornet infestations in any setting.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Baychester?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day hornet removal service in Baychester when you call before noon. Emergency appointments are available for aggressive hornets near entryways or high-traffic areas. Most nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350–$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements for safe removal.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Baychester homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, Baychester's residential areas with mature trees and gardens attract hornets, especially from late spring through fall. They commonly build nests in attics, under roof eaves, in sheds, and around decks. Early detection and removal prevent colonies from growing larger and more dangerous.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and protective equipment to safely eliminate hornet nests. We establish safety perimeters during treatment and provide clear instructions for re-entry. All methods are designed to protect your family, pets, and the surrounding environment.
